narrative:
Cheviot 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,547 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
